data.title: Six Assassin’s Creed Titles Playable Free for All Xbox Players April 2–6
data.description: In San Francisco, Xbox players can enjoy free access to multiple Assassin’s Creed titles from April 2 to April 6. This offer extends to games such as Assassin’s Creed Unity, Syndicate, Origins, Odyssey, Valhalla, and the new addition, Assassin’s Creed Mirage. The promotion does not require an Xbox Game Pass subscription. Alongside the Free Play Days event, players can purchase these six titles at a discount of up to 85% on the Ubisoft Store and Mic platform.
Reports from Israel: Report of a fall in the Petah Tikva area. So far no casualties have been reported

data.title: Transit Technologies Appoints Lisa Horkins as Chief Financial Officer to Support AI-Driven Platform Growth
data.description: A highly experienced finance executive from the technology sector has joined Transit Technologies in Knoxville, Tennessee, on April 2, 2026. This move is aimed at bringing strategic rigor and operational discipline to the company as it prepares to scale up and drive innovation further. Transit Technologies is known for its software solutions that drive modern transit systems. This strategic addition is expected to support the company's growth and innovation initiatives in the upcoming phase.

data.title: FOX NEWS DELIVERS RECORD-SETTING QUARTER ON YOUTUBE BESTING ALL NEWS BRANDS WITH 1.5 BILLION VIDEO VIEWS
data.description: FOX News Channel has maintained its position as the top-rated network for the sixth consecutive quarter. The FOX News Media brands have garnered almost 2 billion views on YouTube. Their coverage of the war in Iran contributed to a record-breaking month in March, with an impressive 621 million YouTube views. This number is double and triple the viewership of both cable and broadcast competitors, solidifying FOX News' dominance in the news media landscape.

data.title: Robert Hall Winery Launches Regenerative Organic Certified® Wines in Earth Month Exclusively at Whole Foods Market
data.description: A winery based in Paso Robles, California, Robert Hall Winery, known for being a pioneer in the Paso Robles AVA and a Regenerative Organic Certified® estate, has introduced two new wines exclusively at Whole Foods Market. The 2024 Cabernet Sauvignon and 2025 Sauvignon Blanc are both Regenerative Organic Certified®, priced at $29.99 each. Robert Hall Winery, a B Corp Certified winery under O’Neill Vintners & Distillers, has created the initial commercially available wines with this certification, available for distribution at retail.

data.title: Trex Named One of America’s Most Trustworthy Companies by Newsweek
data.description: Trex Company, the leading manufacturer of wood-alternative composite decking and railing globally, has been designated as one of the Most Trustworthy Companies in America for 2026 by Newsweek. This recognition follows their inclusion in Newsweek's America’s Most Responsible Companies list for 2024, showcasing their dedication to corporate accountability and openness. Trex Company, listed on NYSE as TREX, continues to excel in producing high-performance, low-maintenance outdoor living products.

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING CodeRabbit Names Enterprise Sales Veteran Matthew Mulqueen as Chief Revenue Officer to Expand Global GTM Operations
data.description: San Francisco - CodeRabbit, a leader in AI code review, has appointed Matthew Mulqueen as Chief Revenue Officer to enhance global go-to-market (GTM) operations. Mulqueen, an experienced enterprise sales veteran, will oversee sales and customer success strategies. This move comes after multiple revisions to the initial announcement.

data.title: ORS™ Haircare Raises the Bar with ORS Unapologetic™, a Science-Backed Length Retention and Styling Collection Co-Created with Crystal Renée Hayslett
data.description: In collaboration with Crystal Renee Hayslett, an actress, producer, and philanthropist, ORS Unapologetic™ has been developed. This product combines elements of culture, science, and performance to introduce purposeful, scientifically-backed formulas. These formulas are tailored to enhance scalp health, promote strength, and aid in retaining length for curly and coiled hair types. The initiative was announced in Chicago on April 2nd.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Pares Losses On Hormuz News, But Oil Holds Gains; Ciena, Lumentum Surge (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following President Trump's speech on Iran, which resulted in a surge in oil prices. Additionally, Tesla's stock dropped due to delivery issues. Despite fluctuations, the Dow managed to reduce losses after news concerning the Hormuz region, while oil prices maintained their gains. Notably, Ciena and Lumentum saw significant increases in their stock values.

data.title: COMPLEX JOINS FANATICS SPORTSBOOK & FANATICS MARKETS TO REDEFINE SPORTS BETTING AND TRADING MEDIA WITH LAUNCH OF COMPLEX BETS, A NEW CULTURE-DRIVEN SPORTS BETTING AND TRADING PLATFORM
data.description: On April 2, 2026, a strategic partnership was announced between Complex and Fanatics Sportsbook & Fanatics Markets. This collaboration aims to merge Complex's cultural storytelling with sports betting and trading data and insights from Fanatics. The partnership will offer original shows, interactive fan engagement formats, and a specialized sports betting and trading content vertical. This alliance seeks to enhance the entertainment value for fans through a unique blend of media offerings.

data.title: THE PICKLR IN CENTRAL INDIANA ANNOUNCES MINOR LEAGUE CLUB AFFILIATION WITH ST. LOUIS SHOCK MLP
data.description: A major indoor pickleball franchise in North America, the St. Louis Shock®, has secured an exclusive agreement for Central Indiana clubs. This deal was signed on April 2, 2026, with the franchise owners of The Picklr. The St. Louis Shock® is a prominent player in Major League Pickleball (MLP), and this agreement marks a significant development in their expansion. This partnership is poised to bring a new level of pickleball experience to the Central Indiana region, with an aim to increase participation and excitment around the sport.

data.title: Coinbase secures conditional bank charter from OCC; won't launch bank. Approval announced Thursday.
data.description: On Thursday, Coinbase announced that it has become the newest cryptocurrency company to obtain a conditional bank charter from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency.

data.title: Coforge and Solstice Innovations Partner to Redefine P&C Insurance Modernization Through Agentic AI
data.description: Coforge and Solstice Innovations have joined forces to boost the adoption of modern core insurance technology for property and casualty insurers. The partnership aims to accelerate the integration of advanced artificial intelligence in the insurance sector. This collaboration between the companies is expected to drive significant advancements in the industry by leveraging cutting-edge AI solutions.
